sources: Stripe · PostHog · Linear · Discord · Google Calendar
footer: Indie SaaS Morning Briefing — template gallery sample. Read-only, polling.

cards.title: 🔥 The one thing
cards.headline: Ship the v2 announcement — 0 users notified yet
cards.sub: v2 went live last night and nobody knows. Send the in-app banner + email before the EU morning peak (next ~2h). Draft is written; it just needs your send.

items.what: Asking if the SSO bug is fixed in v2
items.sub: Blocking her rollout to 40 seats. It is fixed — confirm + share changelog.

items.what: Wants the annual-billing option before renewing
items.sub: $1,200/yr deal. Stripe link not set up yet.

items.what: Export to CSV times out over 10k rows
items.sub: 3 reports this week. Likely the unpaginated query.

cards.bodyHtml: Vercel deploy ✓ ×6, GitHub Actions ✓ ×4, Stripe receipts ×3, 28 newsletters/promos. Worth a glance: AWS «cost anomaly» alert (us-east-1, +$12) — probably the load test.
cards.footnote: a 10s check: «New sign-in to GitHub from a new device» — likely your laptop, confirm it was you.
